statement: In every magma, Equation 905 (`x = y * ((x * z) * (w * u))`) implies Equation 2570 (`x = (y * ((z * x) * x)) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0811
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op y (op (op x z) (op w u)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z x) x)) w)
